revision.comment: per edit request on talk page - include flag variants
revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Gibraltar | flag alias = Flag of Gibraltar.svg | flag alias-ensign = Government Ensign of Gibraltar.svg | flag alias-ensign1875 = Government Ensign of Gibraltar (1875–1921).svg | flag alias-ensign1921 = Government Ensign of Gibraltar (1921–1939).svg | flag alias-ensign1939 = Government Ensign of Gibraltar (1939–1999).svg | flag alias-civil = Civil Ensign of Gibraltar.svg | flag alias-governor = Flag of the Governor of Gibraltar.svg | flag alias-governor1875 = Flag of the Governor of Gibraltar (1875–1939).svg | flag alias-governor1939 = Flag of the Governor of Gibraltar (1939–1982).svg | flag alias-governor1982 = Flag of the Governor of Gibraltar (1982–1999).svg | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = ensign | var2 = ensign1875 | var3 = ensign1921 | var4 = ensign1939 | var5 = civil | var6 = governor | var7 = governor1875 | var8 = governor1939 | var9 = governor1982 | redir1 = GIB </noinclude> }}

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Gibraltar here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive.
